modules.module_title: Types of Waterproofing Materials & Techniques - Part 1 (Membrane Systems)
Types of Waterproofing Materials & Techniques - Part 2 (Sealants & Other Systems)

questions.question: Waterproofing ka primary goal kya hai?

options.B: Water ingress ko prevent karna

questions.explanation: Waterproofing ka mukhya uddeshya building structure mein paani ke ghusne (ingress) ko rokna hai, jisse damage aur leakage se bacha ja sake.

questions.question: PPE ka full form kya hai jo waterproofing ke kaam mein use hota hai?

options.B: Professional Performance Evaluation

questions.explanation: PPE ka matlab 'Personal Protection Equipment' hai, jo workers ko kaam ke dauran chot ya exposure se bachane ke liye zaroori hai.

questions.question: Waterproofing ke liye surface preparation kyu important hai?

options.B: Taaki waterproofing material ki adhesion achhi ho
options.D: Taaki worker ko zyada mehnat na karni pade

questions.explanation: Proper surface preparation se waterproofing material ki substrate par pakad (adhesion) achhi hoti hai, jisse uski effectiveness aur durability badhti hai.

questions.question: Waterproofing technician ko kaam karte samay kaun sa safety gear pehna chahiye?

options.B: Safety helmet, gloves, safety shoes, goggles

questions.explanation: Waterproofing ka kaam karte samay safety helmet, gloves, safety shoes, aur goggles jaise PPE pehna bahut zaroori hai, taaki accidents se bacha ja sake.

questions.question: Substrate mein cracks hone par waterproofing se pehle kya karna chahiye?

options.A: Directly waterproofing material laga dena chahiye
options.B: Cracks ko repair karna chahiye
options.C: Cracks ko ignore kar dena chahiye

questions.explanation: Waterproofing se pehle substrate mein maujood cracks ko repair karna bahut zaroori hai, warna cracks se paani andar ja sakta hai aur waterproofing fail ho sakti hai.

questions.question: Waterproofing ke liye commonly use hone wala tool kya hai?

options.B: Trowel

questions.explanation: Waterproofing ke kaam mein trowel material lagane ke liye, measuring tape measurement ke liye, aur kabhi-kabhi hammer drill surface preparation ke liye bhi use hota hai. Isliye, 'All of the above' sahi answer hai.

questions.question: Waterproofing ka main benefit kya hai building ke liye?

options.A: Building ki re-sale value badhati hai
options.B: Structure ko moisture damage se protect karti hai

questions.explanation: Waterproofing building structure ko moisture aur paani se hone wale nuksaan se bachati hai, jisse uski life aur strength bani rehti hai.

questions.question: Hazardous chemicals ke saath kaam karte samay kaun sa PPE sabse important hai?

options.A: Safety goggles aur chemical resistant gloves
options.B: Normal T-shirt aur shorts

questions.explanation: Hazardous chemicals ke saath kaam karte samay aankhon aur skin ko bachane ke liye safety goggles aur chemical resistant gloves sabse important hain.

questions.question: Waterproofing se pehle surface ko dry hona kyu zaroori hai?

options.A: Geeli surface par material zyada lagta hai
options.B: Geeli surface par material ki adhesion achhi nahi hoti
options.C: Geeli surface par kaam karna mushkil hota hai
options.D: Geeli surface par material jaldi sukh jaata hai

questions.explanation: Zyadatar waterproofing materials ko dry surface par hi achhe se apply kiya ja sakta hai, kyunki geeli surface par unki adhesion weak ho sakti hai, jisse waterproofing fail ho sakti hai.

questions.question: Waterproofing ke kaam mein fire safety ka dhyan rakhna kyu important hai?

options.A: Kyunki kuch materials flammable hote hain
options.B: Kyunki workers ko garmi lagti hai
options.C: Kyunki light ki zaroorat hoti hai
options.D: Kyunki kaam jaldi ho jaata hai

questions.explanation: Kuch waterproofing materials, especially bituminous membranes aur unke primers, flammable ho sakte hain. Isliye fire safety ka dhyan rakhna bahut zaroori hai.

questions.question: Job site par first aid kit hona kyu zaroori hai?

options.A: Minor injuries ko immediately treat karne ke liye
options.B: Lunch break ke liye
options.D: Customers ko impress karne ke liye

questions.explanation: First aid kit job site par minor injuries aur cuts ko turant treat karne ke liye bahut zaroori hai, taaki koi bhi chot badhe nahi.

questions.question: Confined spaces mein kaam karte samay kaun si precaution leni chahiye?

options.B: Proper ventilation aur gas detection equipment use karein
options.D: Koi precaution lene ki zaroorat nahi

questions.explanation: Confined spaces mein toxic gases ya oxygen ki kami ho sakti hai. Isliye proper ventilation aur gas detection equipment ka upyog karna, aur 'permit-to-work' system follow karna bahut zaroori hai.

questions.question: Waterproofing ke kaam mein 'hot work' kya hota hai?

options.A: Garmi mein kiya jaane wala kaam
options.B: Flame ya heat generate karne wala kaam, jaise torching
options.C: Tez dhoop mein kiya jaane wala kaam

questions.explanation: Hot work mein flame ya high heat ka use hota hai, jaise bituminous membranes ko torch-apply karna. Ismein fire hazards ka special dhyan rakhna padta hai.

questions.question: Waterproofing materials ke MSDS (Material Safety Data Sheet) ko padhna kyu important hai?

options.A: Taaki material ka colour pata chale
options.B: Taaki material ke safe handling aur storage ki information mile
options.C: Taaki material ka price pata chale
options.D: Taaki material ki availability pata chale

questions.explanation: MSDS mein material ke chemical properties, potential hazards, safe handling procedures, first aid measures, aur storage instructions ki detailed information hoti hai, jo safety ke liye bahut zaroori hai.

questions.question: Site par electrical safety ke liye kya karna chahiye?

options.B: Damaged electrical tools ka use karein
options.C: Properly insulated tools aur RCD (Residual Current Device) use karein
options.D: Paani ke paas electrical work karein

questions.explanation: Electrical safety ke liye damaged tools ko avoid karna, wires ko theek se manage karna, aur RCD jaise safety devices ka use karna zaroori hai, taaki electric shock se bacha ja sake.

questions.question: Waterproofing ke kaam mein 'fall protection' kab zaroori hota hai?

options.A: Jab bhi heights par kaam kar rahe hon
options.B: Sirf jab baarish ho rahi ho
options.C: Sirf jab subah kaam kar rahe hon

questions.explanation: Jab bhi technician heights par, jaise ki chhat (roof) ya elevated platforms par kaam kar raha ho, tab fall protection (harness, guardrails) zaroori hai taaki girne se bacha ja sake.

questions.question: Waterproofing mein 'negative side' waterproofing ka kya matlab hai?

options.A: Waterproofing material ko structure ke andar se apply karna
options.B: Waterproofing material ko structure ke bahar se apply karna
options.C: Waterproofing material ko neeche se apply karna
options.D: Waterproofing material ko upar se apply karna

questions.explanation: Negative side waterproofing tab ki jaati hai jab paani structure ke bahar se aa raha ho, lekin material ko structure ke andar ki taraf se apply kiya jaata hai, jaise basements mein.

questions.question: Substrate preparation mein sabse pehla step kya hota hai?

options.B: Surface ko saaf karna

questions.explanation: Substrate preparation mein sabse pehle surface ko dhool, mitti, loose particles, grease, aur oil se achhe se saaf karna hota hai.

questions.question: Loose particles ko surface se hatane ke liye kaun sa method use kiya jaata hai?

options.B: Wire brush ya broom se saaf karna

questions.explanation: Loose particles ko hatane ke liye water jet cleaning, wire brush, broom, aur vacuum cleaner sabhi methods effective ho sakte hain, depend karta hai surface type aur contamination par.

questions.question: Concrete surface par waterproofing se pehle curing period ka dhyan rakhna kyu zaroori hai?

options.A: Taaki concrete ka colour achha aaye
options.B: Taaki concrete apni full strength achieve kar le
options.C: Taaki concrete jaldi dry ho jaaye
options.D: Taaki concrete ko polish kiya ja sake

questions.explanation: Concrete ko uski full strength achieve karne aur shrinkage cracks ko minimize karne ke liye proper curing period dena zaroori hai, warna waterproofing material theek se perform nahi karega.

questions.question: Primer ka kya role hai waterproofing system mein?

options.B: Waterproofing material aur substrate ke beech adhesion badhana

questions.explanation: Primer waterproofing material aur substrate ke beech ek strong bond banata hai, jisse adhesion improve hoti hai aur waterproofing system ki performance badhti hai.

questions.question: Substrate mein blowholes ya pinholes ko kaise treat karna chahiye?

options.B: Sealant ya repair mortar se fill karna chahiye
options.D: Unpar extra membrane laga dena chahiye

questions.explanation: Blowholes aur pinholes paani ke liye entry points ban sakte hain. Inhe waterproofing se pehle suitable sealant ya repair mortar se fill karna zaroori hai.

questions.question: Waterproofing materials ko store karte samay kin baaton ka dhyan rakhna chahiye?

options.A: Direct sunlight se door, dry place par store karein
options.B: Geeli jagah par store karein
options.D: High temperature wali jagah par rakhein

questions.explanation: Waterproofing materials ko direct sunlight, extreme temperatures aur moisture se bachane ke liye dry aur cool place par store karna chahiye, jisse unki shelf life aur quality bani rahe.

questions.question: Old waterproofing layer ko naye application se pehle kyu hatana chahiye?

options.A: Naya material uspar theek se adhere nahi karega
options.B: Purana layer looks kharab karta hai

questions.explanation: Agar purana waterproofing layer damaged ya incompatible hai, toh naya material uspar theek se adhere nahi karega, jisse waterproofing fail ho sakti hai. Isliye use remove karna zaroori hai.

questions.question: Convex or concave fillets (coving) corners par kyu banaye jaate hain?

options.B: Taaki material ko corners par easily spread kiya ja sake aur stress concentrate na ho
options.C: Taaki paani corners mein jama ho jaaye

questions.explanation: Corners par fillets banaye jaate hain taaki sharp angles ko smooth kiya ja sake. Isse waterproofing material ko apply karna aasan hota hai aur corners par stress concentration kam hota hai, jisse cracking ka risk kam ho jaata hai.

questions.question: Waterproofing material ko mix karte samay kin baaton ka dhyan rakhna chahiye?

options.B: Koi bhi tool use kar sakte hain
options.C: Kitna bhi paani mila sakte hain

questions.explanation: Material ki proper consistency aur performance ke liye manufacturer ke instructions (mixing ratio, mixing time, tools) ko strictly follow karna zaroori hai.

questions.question: Contaminated surface par waterproofing karne se kya ho sakta hai?

options.A: Waterproofing material ki life badh jaati hai
options.B: Adhesion fail ho sakti hai
options.C: Waterproofing zyada effective ho jaati hai

questions.explanation: Contaminated surface par waterproofing material theek se adhere nahi kar paata, jisse adhesion fail ho sakti hai aur waterproofing system compromise ho jaata hai.

questions.question: Metal surfaces ko waterproofing se pehle kaise prepare karna chahiye?

options.A: Rust aur scale ko remove karein, phir degrease karein
options.B: Directly primer laga dein

questions.explanation: Metal surfaces se rust, scale aur grease ko achhe se remove karna zaroori hai, taaki waterproofing material ki adhesion achhi ho sake aur corrosion na ho.

questions.question: Liquid waterproofing materials ko store karte samay containers ko sealed rakhna kyu zaroori hai?

options.B: Taaki evaporation na ho aur material dry na ho

questions.explanation: Liquid materials ko sealed rakhna zaroori hai taaki evaporation se material dry na ho, ya contaminants usmein na ghus paayein, jisse uski working life aur quality bani rahe.

questions.question: Waterproofing ke kaam mein 'bond breaker' ka kya role hai?

options.B: Waterproofing material ko substrate se alag karna, jahan movement expect ki jaati hai

questions.explanation: Bond breaker ek material hota hai jo waterproofing material ko substrate ya adjacent surface se bond hone se rokta hai, khaaskar wahan jahan movement expected ho, taaki waterproofing layer crack na ho.

questions.question: Waterproofing material ki shelf life kis par depend karti hai?

options.B: Storage conditions aur manufacturing date par

questions.explanation: Material ki shelf life uske manufacturing date aur proper storage conditions (temperature, humidity) par depend karti hai. Incorrect storage se material kharab ho sakta hai.

questions.question: Substrate preparation mein 'levelling' kyu important hai?

options.A: Taaki waterproofing layer uniform ho aur paani jama na ho
options.B: Taaki surface rough ho jaaye

questions.explanation: Levelling se surface smooth aur uniform banti hai, jisse waterproofing material evenly apply hota hai aur paani kahin jama nahi hota, jo waterproofing ki effectiveness ke liye zaroori hai.

questions.question: Bituminous primer ko apply karne ke baad kitne der tak sukhne dena chahiye?

options.B: Manufacturer ke specified drying time ka wait karein

questions.explanation: Bituminous primer ko apply karne ke baad manufacturer dwara specify kiye gaye drying time tak wait karna zaroori hai, taaki solvents evaporate ho jaayein aur primer achhe se set ho jaaye, jisse membrane ki adhesion achhi ho.

questions.question: Cementitious waterproofing se pehle concrete surface ko 'damp' kyu karna chahiye?

options.B: Taaki material ki workability badhe aur premature drying na ho

questions.explanation: Cementitious waterproofing materials ke liye, surface ko damp karne se material ki workability badhti hai, aur concrete surface material se paani ko jaldi absorb nahi karti, jisse premature drying aur cracking ka risk kam hota hai.

questions.question: Bituminous membrane waterproofing mein commonly kaun si heat source use hoti hai?

options.B: Gas torch

questions.explanation: Bituminous membrane waterproofing mein, khaaskar torch-applied membranes ke liye, gas torch ka use hota hai membrane ko heat karke substrate par fuse karne ke liye.

questions.question: APP (Atactic Polypropylene) modified bituminous membrane ki kya property hai?

options.B: High UV resistance aur thermal stability

questions.explanation: APP modified bituminous membranes apni high UV resistance aur thermal stability ke liye jaane jaate hain, jo unhe garmi wale climates ke liye suitable banata hai.

questions.question: SBS (Styrene Butadiene Styrene) modified bituminous membrane ki kya property hai?

options.B: High flexibility aur elasticity at low temperatures

questions.explanation: SBS modified bituminous membranes apni high flexibility aur elasticity ke liye jaane jaate hain, khaaskar thande climates mein, jo unhe structural movements ko accommodate karne mein madad karta hai.

questions.question: Liquid-applied waterproofing membrane lagane ka sabse common method kya hai?

options.B: Brush ya roller se apply karna

questions.explanation: Liquid-applied membranes ko aam taur par brush, roller, ya spray gun se apply kiya jaata hai, jo ek seamless coating banate hain.

questions.question: Self-adhesive waterproofing membranes ko apply karte samay kis cheez ka dhyan rakhna chahiye?

options.B: Overlap joints ko achhe se press karna

questions.explanation: Self-adhesive membranes ko proper adhesion ke liye overlap joints par achhe se press karna zaroori hai, taaki koi air bubble na rahe aur water-tight seal bane.

questions.question: Cementitious waterproofing materials ki kya khaasiyat hai?

options.B: Breathable hote hain aur positive/negative side par lag sakte hain
options.D: Sirf metal surfaces ke liye hain

questions.explanation: Cementitious waterproofing materials breathable hote hain, matlab ye moisture vapor ko pass hone dete hain jabki liquid water ko rokte hain. Ye positive aur negative dono sides par use ho sakte hain.

questions.question: Polyurethane (PU) liquid membrane ki kya property hai?

options.B: High elasticity, crack-bridging ability aur UV resistance

questions.explanation: PU liquid membranes apni high elasticity, outstanding crack-bridging ability, aur UV resistance ke liye jaane jaate hain, jo unhe exposed areas ke liye ideal banata hai.

questions.question: Fibre-reinforced liquid membranes kyu use kiye jaate hain?

options.B: Tensile strength aur crack resistance badhane ke liye
options.D: Drying time kam karne ke liye

questions.explanation: Fibre-reinforced liquid membranes mein fibres add kiye jaate hain taaki unki tensile strength aur crack resistance badh sake, khaaskar jahan movement ya minor cracking expected ho.

questions.question: Waterproofing membrane ke overlaps kitne hone chahiye?

options.B: Minimum 75mm se 100mm

questions.explanation: Waterproofing membrane rolls ko apply karte samay, ek water-tight seal banane ke liye minimum 75mm se 100mm ka overlap rakhna zaroori hai.

questions.question: Bituminous membranes ke saath 'reinforcement mat' kyu use kiya jaata hai?

options.B: Membrane ki tensile strength aur puncture resistance badhane ke liye
options.C: Membrane ko patla karne ke liye
options.D: Drying time kam karne ke liye

questions.explanation: Bituminous membranes mein polyester ya fiberglass jaise reinforcement mats use kiye jaate hain taaki unki tensile strength, tear resistance, aur puncture resistance badh sake, jisse membrane zyada durable bane.

questions.question: Liquid-applied membranes ki drying time kis par depend karti hai?

options.B: Temperature, humidity aur coating thickness par

questions.explanation: Liquid-applied membranes ki drying time surrounding temperature, relative humidity, aur apply ki gayi coating ki thickness par directly depend karti hai.

questions.question: Torch-applied bituminous membrane lagane se pehle surface par primer kyu lagate hain?

options.B: Taaki adhesion achhi ho aur surface dust-free ho
options.D: Taaki membrane ko aasani se hata saken

questions.explanation: Primer surface ki porosity ko seal karta hai, dust ko bind karta hai, aur bituminous membrane ke liye ek sticky base provide karta hai, jisse adhesion significantly improve hoti hai.

questions.question: Waterproofing membrane ko vertical surfaces par kaise apply karna chahiye?

options.B: Bottom se top tak

questions.explanation: Vertical surfaces par membrane ko bottom se top ki taraf apply karna chahiye, taaki overlaps downward-facing hon aur paani unke andar na ghuse.

questions.question: Acrylic liquid waterproofing membrane ki kya property hai?

options.B: Water-based, UV stable aur economical

questions.explanation: Acrylic membranes water-based hote hain, UV stable hote hain, aur economical hote hain. Ye aam taur par exposed roofs par use kiye jaate hain.

questions.question: Liquid-applied membrane ke liye 'wet film thickness' aur 'dry film thickness' kya denote karte hain?

options.B: Wet film thickness liquid state mein hoti hai, dry film thickness sukhne ke baad
options.C: Wet film thickness sukhne ke baad hoti hai
options.D: Dry film thickness liquid state mein hoti hai

questions.explanation: Wet film thickness material ko apply karte samay uski thickness hoti hai, jabki dry film thickness solvents ya paani ke evaporate hone ke baad bachi hui solid layer ki thickness hoti hai. Ye dono alag hote hain kyunki material shrink hota hai.

questions.question: Waterproofing membrane ko corners aur edges par kaise reinforce karna chahiye?

options.A: Extra layer of membrane ya fabric reinforcement use karein
options.B: Sirf ek hi layer laga dein

questions.explanation: Corners aur edges high-stress areas hote hain jahan cracking ka risk zyada hota hai. Inhe extra layers of membrane ya fabric reinforcement strips se reinforce karna chahiye taaki waterproofing intact rahe.

questions.question: Bituminous membrane ke application ke baad 'ponding' kyu avoid karna chahiye?

options.A: Ponding se membrane ka colour kharab hota hai
options.B: Ponding se membrane par stress aata hai aur uski life kam ho sakti hai
options.C: Ponding se membrane jaldi sukh jaati hai
options.D: Ponding se waterproofing zyada effective hoti hai

questions.explanation: Ponding (paani ka jama hona) waterproofing membrane par constant hydrostatic pressure dalta hai aur use UV degradation aur chemical attack ke liye zyada expose karta hai, jisse membrane ki life kam ho sakti hai.

questions.question: Sealant ka primary function kya hai?

options.B: Joints aur gaps ko fill karna aur movement accommodate karna

questions.explanation: Sealant ka mukhya kaam joints, cracks, aur gaps ko fill karna hai, taaki paani aur hawa andar na ja sake, aur saath hi structural movement ko accommodate karna hai.

questions.question: Silicone sealants ki kya khaasiyat hai?

options.B: Excellent UV resistance aur flexibility
options.C: Low temperature par hard ho jaate hain
options.D: Sirf interior use ke liye hain

questions.explanation: Silicone sealants apni excellent UV resistance, high flexibility, aur temperature stability ke liye jaane jaate hain, jo unhe exterior applications ke liye ideal banata hai.

questions.question: Polyurethane (PU) sealants ki kya property hai?

options.B: Good adhesion, flexibility aur paintable

questions.explanation: PU sealants apni achhi adhesion, flexibility, aur paintability ke liye jaane jaate hain. Ye construction joints mein widely use hote hain.

questions.question: Sealant application se pehle 'backer rod' kyu use kiya jaata hai?

options.A: Joint ko decorate karne ke liye
options.B: Sealant ki depth ko control karne aur three-sided adhesion ko rokne ke liye
options.C: Joint ko clean karne ke liye
options.D: Sealant ki curing speed badhane ke liye

questions.explanation: Backer rod sealant ki depth ko control karta hai, uski shape ko maintain karta hai, aur three-sided adhesion ko prevent karta hai, jisse sealant apni full flexibility achieve kar sake.

questions.question: Crystalline waterproofing materials kaise kaam karte hain?

options.A: Surface par ek layer banate hain
options.B: Concrete ke pores mein crystals grow karke unhe seal karte hain

questions.explanation: Crystalline waterproofing materials concrete ke pores aur capillaries mein chemical reaction karke insoluble crystals banate hain, jo paani ko block kar dete hain aur concrete ko waterproof banate hain.

questions.question: Injection grouting ka use kab kiya jaata hai?

options.B: Existing structures mein cracks aur voids ko fill karke leakage rokne ke liye
options.C: Surface ko smooth banane ke liye

questions.explanation: Injection grouting existing structures mein leakage ko rokne ke liye use hoti hai, jahan cracks, voids, ya honeycombs mein pressure se grout inject kiya jaata hai.

questions.question: Water repellents kya karte hain?

options.A: Ek film banakar surface ko seal karte hain
options.B: Surface ki porosity ko kam karte hain, jisse paani repel hota hai

questions.explanation: Water repellents surface ke pores mein penetrate karte hain aur unki hydrophobicity badhate hain, jisse paani surface par bead up hokar slide off ho jaata hai, lekin surface breathable rehti hai.

questions.question: Sealant gun ka kya role hai sealant application mein?

options.B: Sealant ko uniform pressure se apply karna

questions.explanation: Sealant gun sealant cartridges se material ko nikalne aur joints mein uniform pressure aur control ke saath apply karne ke liye use hoti hai.

questions.question: Polysulfide sealants ki kya khaasiyat hai?

options.B: Excellent chemical resistance, fuel resistance aur long-term flexibility

questions.explanation: Polysulfide sealants apni outstanding chemical resistance, fuel resistance, aur long-term flexibility ke liye jaane jaate hain, khaaskar fuel storage tanks aur chemical processing areas mein.

questions.question: 'Tooling' of sealant ka kya matlab hai?

options.B: Apply kiye gaye sealant ko smooth karna aur shape dena

questions.explanation: Tooling ek process hai jismein apply kiye gaye sealant ko ek tooling tool ya finger se smooth kiya jaata hai, taaki achhi adhesion mile aur ek neat finish aaye.

questions.question: Bituminous mastic sealants kahan use hote hain?

options.B: Low movement joints aur repair work mein

questions.explanation: Bituminous mastic sealants aam taur par low movement joints, cracks aur repair work mein use hote hain, jahan high flexibility ki zaroorat nahi hoti.

questions.question: Sealant application se pehle joint surfaces par 'primer' kyu lagate hain?

options.B: Adhesion ko improve karne ke liye
options.C: Joint ko geela karne ke liye
options.D: Sealant ko zyada flexible banane ke liye

questions.explanation: Sealant primers joint surfaces ki adhesion properties ko enhance karte hain, khaaskar porous substrates par ya jahan high performance required ho.

questions.question: Expansion joints mein kaun sa sealant use karna chahiye?

options.B: High-flexibility sealant jaise PU ya Silicone

questions.explanation: Expansion joints structural movement ko accommodate karte hain, isliye unmein high flexibility wale sealants jaise Polyurethane (PU) ya Silicone sealants use karne chahiye.

questions.question: Hydrophilic waterstops kaise kaam karte hain?

options.B: Paani ke contact mein aane par swell hokar seal banate hain
options.C: Paani ko absorb karte hain aur soft ho jaate hain

questions.explanation: Hydrophilic waterstops construction joints mein use hote hain. Ye paani ke contact mein aane par swell (phool) jaate hain aur joint ko seal kar dete hain, paani ke ghusne ko rokte hain.

questions.question: Bituminous protection boards ka kya use hai waterproofing mein?

options.B: Waterproofing membrane ko physical damage se bachane ke liye
options.C: Waterproofing membrane ko chipkane ke liye
options.D: Surface ko rough banane ke liye

questions.explanation: Bituminous protection boards waterproofing membrane ke upar lagaye jaate hain taaki use backfilling, heavy traffic, ya sharp objects se hone wale physical damage se protect kiya ja sake.

questions.question: Sealant application mein 'skinning time' ka kya matlab hai?

options.A: Sealant ke andar tak sukhne ka time
options.B: Sealant ki surface par ek non-tacky film banne ka time
options.C: Sealant ko mix karne ka time
options.D: Sealant ko remove karne ka time

questions.explanation: Skinning time woh time hota hai jab sealant apply hone ke baad uski surface par ek non-tacky film ban jaati hai. Iske baad sealant ko tool nahi karna chahiye.

questions.question: Waterproofing ke liye 'geotextile fabric' kahan use hota hai?

options.B: Waterproofing membrane ko support aur protection dene ke liye, aur drainage mein
options.D: Surface ko smooth banane ke liye

questions.explanation: Geotextile fabrics waterproofing membrane ko puncture se bachane, tensile strength provide karne, aur drainage systems mein filtration aur separation layer ke roop mein use hote hain.

questions.question: Waterproofing mein leak detection ka sabse common method kya hai?

options.B: Visual inspection aur water ponding test

questions.explanation: Leak detection ke liye visual inspection (cracks, stains dekhna) aur water ponding test (paani jama karke leakage dekhna) sabse common aur effective methods hain.

questions.question: Water ponding test kitne time ke liye karna chahiye?

options.B: Minimum 24 se 48 ghante

questions.explanation: Water ponding test ko kam se kam 24 se 48 ghante tak karna chahiye, taaki paani ko chote se chote cracks aur imperfections se penetrate karne ka poora mauka mile.

questions.question: Waterproofing membrane mein minor puncture ko kaise repair karna chahiye?

options.B: Ek patch (same material ka) laga kar seal karein

questions.explanation: Minor punctures ko usi waterproofing material ke patch se repair kiya ja sakta hai, jise puncture ke size se bada kaat kar achhe se seal kiya jaata hai.

questions.question: Adhesion test kyu kiya jaata hai waterproofing mein?

options.A: Material ka colour check karne ke liye
options.B: Waterproofing material ki substrate par pakad (bond strength) check karne ke liye
options.C: Material ki quantity check karne ke liye
options.D: Drying time check karne ke liye

questions.explanation: Adhesion test se yeh pata chalta hai ki waterproofing material substrate par kitni achhi tarah se chipka hua hai, jo uski long-term performance ke liye critical hai.

questions.question: Waterproofing failure ka sabse common reason kya hai?

options.B: Poor surface preparation aur improper application

questions.explanation: Zyadatar waterproofing failures poor surface preparation, galat application techniques, ya incompatible materials ke use ki wajah se hote hain.

questions.question: Thermo-graphic leak detection ka kya fayda hai?

options.A: Ye sirf din mein kaam karta hai
options.B: Non-destructive method hai aur hidden moisture ko detect karta hai
options.C: Sirf visible leaks detect karta hai

questions.explanation: Thermo-graphic leak detection ek non-destructive method hai jo infrared cameras ka use karke temperature differences ko detect karta hai, jisse hidden moisture aur leaks ka pata chalta hai.

questions.question: Waterproofing membrane mein blister (bula) kyu bante hain?

options.A: Material bahut patla lagaya gaya hai
options.B: Trapped moisture ya air ke karan jo heat se expand hoti hai

questions.explanation: Blisters tab bante hain jab membrane ke neeche trapped moisture ya air heat ke karan expand hoti hai, jisse membrane surface se lift ho jaati hai.

questions.question: Agar waterproofing membrane mein bade cracks aa gaye hain, toh repair kaise karenge?

options.B: Affected area ko remove karke naya membrane patch lagayein

questions.explanation: Bade cracks ya damage ke liye, affected area ko remove karke, surface ko prepare karke, aur naya membrane patch lagana sabse effective repair method hai.

questions.question: Leakage ke source ko identify karna kyu important hai repair se pehle?

options.A: Taaki repair sahi jagah par ho aur permanent solution mile
options.B: Taaki repair work zyada time le

questions.explanation: Agar leakage ka source theek se identify nahi kiya gaya, toh repair temporary hoga aur leakage phir se ho sakti hai. Sahi source pata hone se permanent solution milta hai.

questions.question: Electronic leak detection method ka kya fayda hai?

options.A: Sirf visible leaks detect karta hai
options.B: Non-destructive hai aur pin-point accuracy se leaks detect karta hai
options.C: Bahut sasta hai aur koi skill nahi chahiye
options.D: Sirf interior use ke liye hai

questions.explanation: Electronic leak detection (jaise vector mapping, spark testing) non-destructive methods hain jo waterproofing membranes mein chote se chote punctures ya leaks ko high accuracy ke saath detect karte hain.

questions.question: Waterproofing membrane mein 'fish mouths' kyu bante hain?

options.A: Proper overlap na hone aur air trapping ke karan
options.B: Membrane bahut achhi tarah se lagi hai

questions.explanation: Fish mouths tab bante hain jab membrane ke overlaps theek se seal nahi hote ya air trapped ho jaati hai, jisse edges lift ho jaati hain aur paani andar ghus sakta hai.

questions.question: Repair work mein 'compatibility' ka kya matlab hai?

options.A: Naya repair material purane material ke saath achhe se mix ho
options.B: Naya repair material purane material se alag ho
options.C: Repair material ka colour achha ho

questions.explanation: Compatibility ka matlab hai ki naya repair material purane waterproofing system ke saath chemically aur physically compatible hona chahiye, taaki achha bond bane aur repair effective ho.

questions.question: Waterproofing failure ko rokne ke liye sabse achha tareeka kya hai?

options.B: Proper design, quality materials aur skilled application

questions.explanation: Waterproofing failures ko rokne ke liye sahi design, high-quality materials, aur experienced technicians dwara proper application bahut zaroori hai.

questions.question: Waterproofing repair ke baad 're-testing' kyu zaroori hai?

options.B: Taaki confirm ho sake ki repair successful raha hai aur leakage band ho gayi hai
options.C: Taaki worker ko zyada kaam mile

questions.explanation: Repair ke baad re-testing (jaise water ponding test) karna zaroori hai taaki yeh confirm ho sake ki leakage successfully band ho gayi hai aur repair effective raha hai.

questions.question: Crack injection repair mein kaun sa material use hota hai?

options.B: Epoxy ya Polyurethane resin

questions.explanation: Crack injection repair mein high-pressure pumps ka use karke Epoxy ya Polyurethane resins ko cracks mein inject kiya jaata hai, jo cracks ko seal kar dete hain aur structural integrity ko restore karte hain.

questions.question: Waterproofing system ki durability kis par depend karti hai?

options.B: Material ki quality, application method, aur environmental factors par

questions.explanation: Waterproofing system ki durability material ki quality, uske application method, aur site par maujood environmental factors (UV exposure, temperature variations) par depend karti hai.

questions.question: Terrace waterproofing ke liye sabse common material kaun sa hai?

options.B: Bituminous membranes ya Liquid-applied PU/Acrylic membranes

questions.explanation: Terrace waterproofing ke liye bituminous membranes (APP/SBS) aur liquid-applied PU ya acrylic membranes sabse common aur effective solutions hain, jo UV resistance aur flexibility provide karte hain.

questions.question: Basement waterproofing mein 'drainage board' ka kya role hai?

options.B: Waterproofing membrane ko protect karna aur paani ko drain karna

questions.explanation: Basement waterproofing mein drainage board waterproofing membrane ko backfilling ke damage se protect karta hai aur structure ke paas jama hone wale paani ko drain kar deta hai, jisse hydrostatic pressure kam hota hai.

questions.question: Bathroom waterproofing mein sabse critical area kaun sa hai?

options.B: Shower area aur floor-wall junctions

questions.explanation: Bathroom waterproofing mein shower area aur floor-wall junctions sabse critical hote hain, kyunki yahan paani ka direct aur constant exposure hota hai, jahan leakage ka risk sabse zyada hota hai.

questions.question: Swimming pool waterproofing ke liye kis tarah ke materials ki zaroorat hoti hai?

options.B: High chemical resistance aur flexibility wale materials

questions.explanation: Swimming pool waterproofing mein aise materials ki zaroorat hoti hai jo constant water exposure, chlorine chemicals, aur structural movements ko withstand kar saken, jaise high-performance cementitious ya PU systems.

questions.question: Green roof waterproofing mein kaun si extra layer zaroori hoti hai?

options.B: Root barrier layer

questions.explanation: Green roofs mein plants ki roots waterproofing membrane ko damage kar sakti hain. Isliye ek dedicated root barrier layer zaroori hoti hai jo roots ko penetrate karne se rokti hai.

questions.question: Waterproofing project ke liye cost estimation mein kya shamil hota hai?

options.B: Material cost, labour cost, equipment cost aur overheads

questions.explanation: Cost estimation mein material ki lagat, workers ki mazdoori, equipment ka kharch, aur anya overhead expenses (transport, supervision) sab shamil hote hain.

questions.question: Client ko project ke dauran regularly update karna kyu zaroori hai?

options.B: Taaki trust bana rahe aur koi miscommunication na ho
options.D: Sirf extra bill banane ke liye

questions.explanation: Regular communication se client ka trust bana rehta hai, unhe project progress ki jaankari milti rehti hai, aur kisi bhi samasya ko jaldi suljhaya ja sakta hai.

questions.question: Waterproofing contract mein 'warranty' ka kya matlab hai?

options.B: Workmanship aur material ki guarantee ek specified period ke liye

questions.explanation: Warranty ek commitment hoti hai ki waterproofing work aur materials ek specified period ke liye defect-free rahenge, aur agar koi problem aati hai toh use repair kiya jaayega.

questions.question: Waterproofing project completion ke baad kaun se documents client ko dene chahiye?

options.B: Warranty certificate, maintenance guidelines aur 'as-built' drawings (agar applicable ho)

questions.explanation: Completion par warranty certificate, future maintenance ke liye guidelines, aur 'as-built' drawings dena professional practice hai, jo client ko system ko maintain karne mein madad karta hai.

questions.question: Waterproofing ke kaam mein 'quality check' kyu zaroori hai?

options.A: Sirf time waste karne ke liye
options.B: Taaki work specification aur standards ke according ho

questions.explanation: Quality check se yeh confirm hota hai ki waterproofing work specified standards, design aur manufacturer ke guidelines ke anusaar kiya gaya hai, jisse long-term performance assured hoti hai.

questions.question: Waterproofing ke kaam mein 'drip edge' ka kya function hai?

options.A: Paani ko roof ke edge par jama karna
options.B: Paani ko roof edge se dur direct karna, taaki walls par na bahe

questions.explanation: Drip edge ek metal flashing hota hai jo roof ke edges par install kiya jaata hai, taaki paani roof edge se dur gir kar walls par behne se bache aur wall damage na ho.

questions.question: Waterproofing project ke liye 'site survey' kyu important hai?

options.A: Sirf client se milne ke liye
options.B: Existing conditions ko samajhne aur sahi solution recommend karne ke liye
options.C: Kaam ko delay karne ke liye

questions.explanation: Site survey se existing conditions, substrate type, damage extent, aur specific requirements ko samajhne mein madad milti hai, jisse ek effective aur customised waterproofing solution provide kiya ja sake.

questions.question: Waterproofing mein 'UV stability' ka kya matlab hai?

options.A: Material ka colour change na ho
options.B: Material direct sunlight (UV rays) ke exposure par degrade na ho
options.C: Material paani ko absorb na kare

questions.explanation: UV stability ka matlab hai ki material ultraviolet (UV) rays ke direct exposure par bhi apni physical aur chemical properties ko maintain rakhe, degrade na ho.

questions.question: Project schedule banate samay kin factors ka dhyan rakhna chahiye?

options.B: Weather conditions, material delivery, curing times aur work sequence

questions.explanation: Effective project schedule banane ke liye weather, material delivery, har step ke curing times, aur kaam ke sequence jaise factors ka dhyan rakhna zaroori hai taaki project smoothly complete ho.

questions.question: Waterproofing ke kaam mein 'drainage' ka kya importance hai?

options.B: Surface se paani ko efficiently remove karna, taaki ponding na ho

questions.explanation: Proper drainage waterproofing system ki life aur effectiveness ke liye critical hai. Ye surface par paani ko jama hone se rokta hai, jisse hydrostatic pressure aur material degradation kam hota hai.

questions.question: Waterproofing ke baad 'maintenance' kyu zaroori hai?

options.A: Sirf paisa kharch karne ke liye
options.B: System ki long-term performance aur life ko ensure karne ke liye
options.C: Maintenance se system kharab hota hai

questions.explanation: Regular maintenance, jaise cleaning aur minor repairs, waterproofing system ki long-term performance aur life ko ensure karta hai aur major failures ko rokta hai.
